response.step_by_step_log:
1. Visual OCR identified the song title '炎夏' from the top-left corner during the performance at 00:00.
2. Searched 'Anya Melfissa 炎夏 lyrics' to confirm the artist/original composer (Toiki) and find full lyrics.
3. Found the lyrics on multiple sites, including Uta-Net and YouTube descriptions.
4. Extracted and translated the provided snippet of lyrics to create the JSON object.
response.global_summary: A 3D concert performance of the song '炎夏' (Enka/Encount) by Anya Melfissa, followed by a manga-style narrative sequence and a birthday message from the performer.

scenes.description: Anya Melfissa performs her original song '炎夏'. The title is shown in the top-left of the screen. Lyrics appear on-screen in Japanese.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
知った、救いのない形だった僕の聲は
散った、狂いのない赤い血が流れているんだ
ただただ襲い来る影ばかり満ちて
揶揄う言葉たち　あがれない夜風
赫くひかる地獄へ裸足で駆けたら
ただ膝を抱えている貴方がいた
だから
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I knew it, it was a hopeless shape, my voice
It scattered, the blood without madness is flowing
Only shadows attacking, filling everything
The teasing words, the night breeze I cannot rise from
If I ran barefoot to the hell glowing brightly
There you were, holding your knees
That is why
